metadata.title: Jump to link
metadata.description: This plugin allows open a link in current document or regex based navigation in editor mode using hotkey

regex.target: name: "跳转到符合正则的位置"
text: '参数设置（跳转到链接点）(Fendi 2024-09-24 汉化）'

regex.source: setDesc('The characters placed next to each link after enter link-hint mode.'
regex.target: setDesc('进入提示链接模式后，放置在链接点旁边的字符。'

regex.source: setDesc("Regex based navigating in editor mode"
regex.target: setDesc("编辑器模式下基于正则的导航"
setName('匹配正则表达式（区分大小写）'

regex.source: setDesc('If enabled, the regex for matching will be case sensitive.'
regex.target: setDesc('启用后，匹配正则表达式将区分大小写。'

regex.source: .setName('Jump to Link If Only One Link In Page')
regex.target: .setName('如果页面中只有一个链接，则跳转到链接')

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, auto jump to link if there is only one link in page')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用，如果页面中只有一个链接，则自动跳转到链接')

regex.source: .setName('Lightspeed only jumps to start of words')
.setDesc('If enabled, lightspeed jumps will only target characters occuring at the start of words.')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用，光速跳跃将仅针对出现在单词开头的字符。')
